extDescription.message: Passman - Die wagwoordbestuurder vir NextCloud / ownCloud

save_to.description: Amount of the credentials found for the current site

enable_update_url.message: Ask to update credential URL if it doesn't match the current URL

password_picker_gotolist.message: When a password is found, go to list rather than last active tab

extension_locked.message: Passman-uitbreiding is vergrendel, ontgrendel om te gebruik
extension_locked.description: When the extension is locked, and requires an unlock to use it

msg_reset_extension.message: You can reset your password. This will reset the extension to its default state.

no_vaults.message: Sorry,no vaults found. Please create a vault via the Nextcloud / ownCloud app and try again.

enter_master_password_desc.message: This password will be used to encrypt all your settings in the extension. You can choose to save this password locally, but it will be saved in PLAINTEXT.

invalid_master_password.description: When the master password is invalid

add_hint.message: After creating it, you can edit the credential in Passman
add_hint.description: After creating it, you can edit the credential in Passman

text.description: To describe a textual input field

disable_picker_text.message: Would you like to disable Passman for the current page, or for the entire website?
disable_picker_text.description: Would you like to disable Passman for the current page, or for the entire website?

intro_text.message: This wizard will guide you trough the steps to set up the extension and keep all your passwords synchronized.

ignore_site_placeholder.message: Enter a domain or TLD to ignore and press ↵

master_pw_warning.message: The master password is stored encrypted on this device so the extension can unlock automatically. Anyone with full access to this browser profile could still recover it.

browser_action_title_locked.description: Browser extension title when the extension is locked

select_password_picker_default_tab.message: When the Password picker is unable to find any credentials, it will go to:

extra_accounts.message: After the setup process is complete, you can add more accounts.

saving_to.description: Amount of the credentials found for the current site

auto_login.message: Passman is logging you in as $USERNAME$
auto_login.description: Amount of the credentials in the database

default_vault_desc.message: Select the vault that you want to keep in sync with the webbrowser.
default_vault_desc.description: Select the vault that you want to keep in sync with the webbrowser.

invalid_response_from_server.description: No credentials found for the current site

edit_insufficient_permissions.message: You don't have the permission to edit this credential.
edit_insufficient_permissions.description: You don't have permissions to edit this credential.

no_credentials_found.description: No credentials found for the current site

search_for.description: No credentials found for the current site

http_warning.message: Slegs HTTPS-bedieners word ondersteun — http://-adresse word nie aanvaar nie.
http_warning.description: Shown when the server address uses http:// — only HTTPS is supported

no_credentials_found_for_site.message: No credentials found for this site.
no_credentials_found_for_site.description: No credentials found for the current site

enable_autosubmit.message: Enable form auto submit after picking account

notes.description: No credentials found for the current site

https_unreachable.message: Kon hierdie bediener nie oor HTTPS bereik nie. Gaan die adres na en probeer weer.
https_unreachable.description: Shown when the HTTPS reachability check fails during setup

master_key_too_short.message: Die hoofwagwoord moet minstens 8 karakters lank wees.
master_key_too_short.description: Master password below the minimum length

credential_damaged.message: Hierdie geloofsbrief kon nie volledig ontsleutel word nie — die gestoorde data is beskadig. Om die rekord te beskerm kan dit nie gewysig word nie; skrap dit en skep ’n nuwe een.
credential_damaged.description: Shown when saving a credential whose fields failed to decrypt

theme.description: Label for the theme preference section

theme_system.description: Follow the operating system color scheme

about.description: Label for the About section in settings

no_custom_fields.description: Shown in the credential editor when a credential has no custom fields

credentials_loaded.description: Popup header subtitle showing how many credentials are loaded

setup_complete.message: Alles is opgestel en gereed vir gebruik. Maak Passman Premium vanaf die nutsbalk oop om jou geloofsbriewe te blaai — passende aanmeldings word op elke werf voorgestel, en nuwe aanmeldings kan gestoor word soos jy blaai.
setup_complete.description: Shown under the Done! heading on the last setup step

generate.description: Password picker tab name in the default-tab select

connection_timeout_error.message: Kon die bediener nie bereik nie — die verbinding het uitgetel.
connection_timeout_error.description: Notification when the Nextcloud server does not answer in time

connection_error.message: Kon die bediener nie bereik nie ($ERROR$).
connection_error.description: Notification for a failed server connection

credentials_refreshed.description: Header status flash after a manual refresh completes

open_password_picker.description: Aria label for the in-field button that opens the password picker
